items.title: FCA warns customers of HDH Investment Services Limited
items.summary:
We're concerned that HDH Investment Services Limited may have given unsuitable financial advice to some of its customers, potentially leading to financial loss.

items.title: Man jailed for running illegal sale-and-rent-back scheme targeting struggling homeowners
items.summary:
Rajinder Gill and accomplices have been sentenced for their involvement in a sale-and-rent-back scheme.

Mr Gill has been sentenced to two and a half years in prison for running a sale-and-rent-back scheme without being authorised and illegally providing credit agreements and mortgages. As accomplic

items.title: FCA imposes restrictions on Sendsii Ltd
items.summary:
On 23 January 2026, the FCA imposed requirements on Sendsii Ltd which prevent them from carrying out any regulated activity.

items.title: Concept Capital Group update: administrators appointed
items.summary:
On 9 March 2026, the High Court placed Concept Capital Group (CCG) into administration. BTG are the administrators of the company.

In July 2025, the FCA announced High Court proceedings against CCG and others over an alleged unauthorised investment scheme. CCG has been under a court order that temp

items.title: FCA bans Kasim Garipoglu from working in UK financial services
items.summary:
KasimGaripoglu has been banned from working in UK financial services. The FCA found he is not fit and proper because of his lack of honesty and integrity.

items.title: FATF warns of rising cyber-enabled fraud and widening money laundering, terrorist financing, and proliferation financing risks
items.summary: The Financial Action Task Force warns of rising cyber fraud. This crime now links heavily with money laundering and terror financing.
